description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Aarch64 Linux Wheels that runs on pull requests, pushes to specific branches (nightly, main, and release candidate branches), and workflow dispatches. The workflow generates a build matrix for Aarch64 Linux wheel packages, then uses this matrix to build wheels for specified repositories (like pytorch/FBGEMM) with custom scripts and environment variables, uploading the results to AWS PyTorch Uploader.
